products.name: Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Shampoo 370 ml
products.description: A lightweight, deeply hydrating shampoo from the Garnier Whole Blends line, inspired by natural honey hive goodness. Enriched with Honey Water to restore essential moisture to dry, dull, or dehydrated hair without weighing it down. Gently cleanses impurities while infusing strands with hydration, softness, manageability, and natural shine. Paraben-free formula that maintains the hair's natural moisture balance, creates a rich lather, and leaves hair feeling revived, supple, and revitalized. Ideal for daily use on dry to normal hair types seeking lightweight moisture and a healthy glow. Imported from Canada.
products.how_to_use: Apply a generous amount to wet hair, massage into a rich lather, and rinse thoroughly. For best results, follow with the Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Conditioner and other products in the Honey Water line.

products.how_to_use: Apply a generous amount to wet hair, massage into a rich lather, and rinse thoroughly. For best results, follow with the Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Conditioner and other products in the Honey Water line.

products.name: L'Oréal Paris Hair Expertise Glycolic Gloss Shine Sulfate-Free Shampoo 200ml
products.description: A sulfate-free shine-enhancing shampoo powered by Glycolic Acid Complex, designed as the first step in the Glycolic Gloss system. Glycolic Acid (an AHA) penetrates the hair fiber to restore internal quality, smooth and seal the cuticles, and create a mirror-like reflective surface for intense, long-lasting gloss (up to 2x shinier hair). Gently cleanses without stripping natural oils or fading color, leaving hair silky, smooth, manageable, and vibrant with a fresh fragrance (grapefruit, jasmine, cedarwood notes). Ideal for dull, rough, porous, frizzy, or color-treated hair seeking salon-level shine and smoothness at home. Imported from Canada, cruelty-free, and part of the L'Oréal Paris Hair Expertise Glycolic Gloss range.
products.how_to_use: Apply a generous amount to wet hair. Gently massage into the scalp and work into a rich lather through the lengths. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. For maximum shine results, follow with the L'Oréal Paris Glycolic Gloss Conditioner, optional 5 Minute Lamination Treatment, and Illuminating Serum.

products.name: L'Oréal Paris Hair Expertise Bond Repair Rescue Pre-Shampoo for Damaged Hair - 200ml
products.description: An intensive rinse-off pre-shampoo treatment that serves as the first step in the Bond Repair routine, featuring the highest concentration (12%) of Bond Repair Complex powered by Citric Acid. It penetrates deep into the hair cortex to neutralize bond-breaking mineral ions, rebuild inner broken disulfide bonds, and reconstruct hair structure from within for maximum repair before cleansing. Oversaturates damp hair for deep absorption, significantly reducing breakage (up to 98% less with full routine), boosting shine (up to 90%), and strengthening hair (up to 82%). Ideal for chemically treated, heat-damaged, or chronically weakened hair, leaving it stronger, healthier, softer, and more resilient. Imported from Canada, part of the L'Oréal Paris Hair Expertise Bond Repair line.
products.how_to_use: Apply to damp hair before shampooing. Massage in thoroughly to oversaturate strands. Leave on as directed (typically a few minutes for penetration), then rinse. Follow with the Bond Repair shampoo and conditioner for complete results. Use 1-2 times per week or as needed for severely damaged hair.
